_data.text:
## What is Hospital Management System (HMS) ?
Hospital management system is a computer system that helps manage the information related to health care and aids in the job completion of health care providers effectively.

## What is Ospic ? 
Ospic is a web based open source Hospital Management system. By the time of writing this ospic was still under development and capable of managing the following parts of healthy organization
- Patient 
  - Outpatient department
  - In-patient department
  - Patient records
  - Doctor + Patient appointment
- Inventory
  - Pharmarcy
  - Medicine's
  - Blood bank
  - Wards and Beds
- Laboratory
- Radiology
- Oragnization
  - Staffs
  - Departments and
  - Services
- Finance
  - Service bills
  - Transaction tracking system
  - Financial reports 


## You can't wait to see it ?
NOTE: each user differ in role's and authorities, not each user can do everything e.g If your user is not member of any department you can not give service to any patient. Same to finance if your user have not accountant role or higher role than you won't be able to see bills or transactions. You can now login in our [demo servers](https://app.ospicx.com/#/finance) `Username: demo, Password: password`.

_data.description: Learning how to ospic authentication works to access the system informations
_data.title: Authentication and authorization
_data.subtitle: Users authentication and authorization

children.value: To access the system information one need to login using their username and password. The login screen appears to look like the screenshot below.
For demonstration purpose you can try to login into our
. This will give you a list of users. With administrator priviledge you can now create a new user by clicking
button. Fill the required fields NOTE: the username and password will be used later for login, select the role of user in the system if no role provided the user with be have

by default. Checking Is staff checkbox will open selection for department where you want to assign this user and automatically assign this user as member of that department. Now the user can login with provided username and password.
To edit existing user in your users list click the edit icon
you will be provided with popup screen with information already filled for editing.
In your users list click trash-can
icon, The dialog screen will popup to ask if you real mean to delete this user.
Confirming by yes or no the operation will succeed as you asked.

Ospic deals with human confidential information. With this understanding we have implemented strict Authorization and Authentication methods just to make sure that the one using the system is exactly who is pretending to be and is allowed to perform what operation is trying to perfom. Soon after installation the database comes with default user for testing
. The system admin can navigate to
to create a new user, assign them roles then login.
After your day activities you may want to call it a day,  just click a button with power icon
in your toolbar as shown in dashboard

_data.text: ### Login page To access the system information one need to login using their username and password. The login screen appears to look like the screenshot below. For demonstration purpose you can try to login into our [Demo server]() with `Username: demo, Password: password`. ### Create new user In your navigation drawer select [Settings and configurations](/docs/a/#settings-and-configurations). This will give you a list of users. With administrator priviledge you can now create a new user by clicking CREATE NEW user button. Fill the required fields NOTE: the username and password will be used later for login, select the role of user in the system if no role provided the user with be have USER ROLE by default. Checking Is staff checkbox will open selection for department where you want to assign this user and automatically assign this user as member of that department. Now the user can login with provided username and password. ### Edit user To edit existing user in your users list click the edit icon you will be provided with popup screen with information already filled for editing. ### Delete user In your users list click trash-can icon, The dialog screen will popup to ask if you real mean to delete this user. Confirming by yes or no the operation will succeed as you asked. ### Authorization and default user Ospic deals with human confidential information. With this understanding we have implemented strict Authorization and Authentication methods just to make sure that the one using the system is exactly who is pretending to be and is allowed to perform what operation is trying to perfom. Soon after installation the database comes with default user for testing `Username: demo Password: password`. The system admin can navigate to [Settings and configurations](/docs/a/#settings-and-configurations) to create a new user, assign them roles then login. ### Logout After your day activities you may want to call it a day, just click a button with power icon in your toolbar as shown in dashboard [Toolbar section](docs/homepage#tool-bar)

_data.description: Dashboard screen display an organizational day-to-day statistical records.
_data.title: Dashboard

children.value: This is the first page after login. It  display statistical records and contain the following statistical graphs.
This appear as the top most part of the screen for all pages. It have three buttons i.e
For manually refreshing the administrator dashboard demographic datas.
Switch between dark and light themes.

This display the total number of seletcive records from the system e,g Total number of patients and in terms of thier gender(i.e Male, female and unspecified), total number of staffs, consultations and assigned and un-assigned consultations , number of bed, occupied and un-occupied beds, total OPD and IPD's etc.
The six sibling pie charts potray  records conposition in the following sequence
gender composition (i.e Male vs female), IPD vs OPD,  Consultations (i.e active vs inactive), Consultation assignment (i.e Assigned vs Un-assigned) , beds distribution and  System users
A linear graph shows the number of consultations conducted per day
Shows the frequency of new patient registrations per gender distributions

_data.text: This is the first page after login. It display statistical records and contain the following statistical graphs. ### Tool bar This appear as the top most part of the screen for all pages. It have three buttons i.e * Refresh button: For manually refreshing the administrator dashboard demographic datas. * Logout button: For logout * Theme select button: Switch between dark and light themes. ### Totals This display the total number of seletcive records from the system e,g Total number of patients and in terms of thier gender(i.e Male, female and unspecified), total number of staffs, consultations and assigned and un-assigned consultations , number of bed, occupied and un-occupied beds, total OPD and IPD's etc. ### Statistical pie graphs The six sibling pie charts potray records conposition in the following sequence gender composition (i.e Male vs female), IPD vs OPD, Consultations (i.e active vs inactive), Consultation assignment (i.e Assigned vs Un-assigned) , beds distribution and System users respectively ### Consultations frequency graph A linear graph shows the number of consultations conducted per day ### Patients/Clients registrations frequency Shows the frequency of new patient registrations per gender distributions

_data.description: Create, update, delete patients, initiate patient consultations and create appointment. View assigned and un-assigned patient consultations
_data.title: Patients

children.value: This shows the list of an assigned and un-assgined consultation. Assigned consultation list all active created consultations and assigned to any medical specialist or staff, but un-assigned work the opposite.
This section list available patients and their status i.e Active or Inactive.
You can also create new patient, view patient, edit patient information, add patient contacts informations, upload patient profile image, Initiate patient consultation service to be attended
The patient/client registration can be done only once. To create a new patient in you patients list click

button, this will navigate you to a new page to fill out some new client information like Fullname, age, weight, height etc. All fields are mandatory except fot Note. After you fill the information click save button.

After succesfully submit you will be redirect to the created client profile. In the list of clients you can also select one to view his/her details. Currently client profile shows Biography and Consultation history.
To edit patient click edit button
it will give you the edit option click save after you have editted.
To upload client image for later refferences click upload button
the popup screen with image select option will appear select image and click save to persist.  The selected image will appear on client profile.
button. The new page to fill contacts information appear after you have filled the contacts information click submit button. Then the contacts information will appear below client profile image.

In the client profile you can create new service instance for client each time the client visit the health organization after the first day of registration the client will be served as consultation instance. All medical procedures, consts and reports will be under this consultation instance. From the profile select the Consultation tab it will display the list of consultation ever received by particular client in that organization.

button to initiate client consultation. But this button only appears if client has no any other active consultation service.  Soon after intiating the consultation this consultation will appear in the list
consultations. And if the patient under the consultation get addmitted then it will appear under the list of
This list all Out-patient client consultations.
This list all In-patient client consultations.

_data.text: ## Appointments This shows the list of an assigned and un-assgined consultation. Assigned consultation list all active created consultations and assigned to any medical specialist or staff, but un-assigned work the opposite. - Un-assigned patient consultations list - Assigned patient consultations list ## Patients This section list available patients and their status i.e Active or Inactive. You can also create new patient, view patient, edit patient information, add patient contacts informations, upload patient profile image, Initiate patient consultation service to be attended ### Create new patient The patient/client registration can be done only once. To create a new patient in you patients list click + Add new patient button, this will navigate you to a new page to fill out some new client information like Fullname, age, weight, height etc. All fields are mandatory except fot Note. After you fill the information click save button. ### View client After succesfully submit you will be redirect to the created client profile. In the list of clients you can also select one to view his/her details. Currently client profile shows Biography and Consultation history. ### Edit client To edit patient click edit button it will give you the edit option click save after you have editted. ### Upload client image To upload client image for later refferences click upload button the popup screen with image select option will appear select image and click save to persist. The selected image will appear on client profile. ### Add patient contacts Click add contacts button. The new page to fill contacts information appear after you have filled the contacts information click submit button. Then the contacts information will appear below client profile image. ### Consultations In the client profile you can create new service instance for client each time the client visit the health organization after the first day of registration the client will be served as consultation instance. All medical procedures, consts and reports will be under this consultation instance. From the profile select the Consultation tab it will display the list of consultation ever received by particular client in that organization. The consultation list also have new consultation button to initiate client consultation. But this button only appears if client has no any other active consultation service. Soon after intiating the consultation this consultation will appear in the list [OPD department](/docs/patients#opd-department) consultations. And if the patient under the consultation get addmitted then it will appear under the list of [IPD department consultations](/docs/patients#ipd-department) ## OPD department This list all Out-patient client consultations. ## IPD department This list all In-patient client consultations.

_data.text:
#### Users authentication
Ospic deals with human confidential information. With this understanding we have implemented strict Authorization and Authentication methods just to make sure that the one using the system is exactly who is pretending to be and is allowed to perform what operation is trying to perfom. Soon after installation the database comes with default user for testing `username = demo` and `password=password`. The system admin can navigate to [Settings and configurations](/docs/a/#settings-and-configurations) to create a new user, assign them roles then login.

_data.text:
## Authentication

Ospic deals with human confidential information. With this understanding we have implemented strict Authorization and Authentication methods just to make sure that the one using the system is exactly who is pretending to be and is allowed to perform what operation is trying to perfom. Soon after installation the database comes with default user for testing `username = demo` and `password=password`. The system admin can navigate to [Settings and configurations](/docs#settings-and-configurations) to create a new user, assign them roles then login.

_data.text:
## Authentication

Ospic deals with human confidential information. With this understanding we have implemented strict Authorization and Authentication methods just to make sure that the one using the system is exactly who is pretending to be and is allowed to perform what operation is trying to perfom. Soon after installation the database comes with default user for testing `username = demo` and `password=password`. The system admin can navigate to [Settings and configurations](/docs#settings-and-configurations) to create a new user, assign them roles then login.
